title: Brabantia 112928 Pedal Bin Newicon with plastic inner Bucket, Matt Black - 5 L
features: Foot operated pedal opening with odour-proof soft closure lid
Made from durable corrosion resistant materials with sturdy carry handle and protective floor ring
Removable inner bucket with matching size Brabantia bin liners available
description: From the manufacturer About Brabantia Beautifully designed quality products Cradle-to-Cradle certified Designing sustainability into our products Brabantia Pedal Bin NewIcon For any room that could use a great little bin! Brabantia’s NewIcon 5 litre is not only stylish and hygienic, but a reliable worker too. Sturdy, and always standing strong because of its non-slip base and anti-tilting block. The lid is odour-proof, closes softly and opens at the lightest tap of your foot. A small touch of timeless design for your bathroom, toilet or nursery. NewIcon is available in lots of colours & sizes. Product information Capacity: 5L Colour: Matt Black Dimensions: W20.5 x D27.2 x H29.1 cm Weight: 1.102 kg Key features. Soft closing lid Light pedal operation Odour proof closure Built-in anti-tilting block Non-slip base Made from highly durable steel Easy to clean. This 5L NewIcon pedal bin is made of corrosion resistant materials and has a removable plastic inner bucket. Ideal for humid areas like your toilet and bathroom. More sustainable choice. Made from 47% recycled material, 96% recyclable after use. PerfectFit Bin Liners. Sample pack of Brabantia PerfectFit bin bags enclosed (code W) – easy to fit without ugly overwrap.
